post.description: Creates a new promoter user and returns access/refresh tokens.

get.description: Returns all geofence definitions for the operations dashboard.

get.description: Returns all sales regions for assignment and reporting.

post.description: Creates a region. Slug is generated from `name` if omitted (unique suffix added on collision). User.regionId must match a region id (cuid), not the slug.

get.description: Campaigns / activations with region and counts.

403.description: Requires supervisor or admin; only admins may create supervisor/admin

409.description: Phone or email already in use

patch.description: Partial update. Supervisors may edit promoters and merchandizers only. Only admins may assign supervisor or admin roles.

403.description: Not allowed for this role or target user

get.description: Returns a simple health signal for uptime probes.

post.description: Stores a location ping for the authenticated user.

info.title: Engaged Sales API
info.description: API documentation for Engaged Sales backend

latitude.description: Device latitude (decimal degrees). For promoters and merchandizers: required when at least one geofence is active (send with longitude). Supervisors and admins may omit coordinates.

longitude.description: Device longitude (decimal degrees). For promoters and merchandizers: required with latitude when geofencing is enforced. Supervisors and admins may omit.

state.description: Signed OAuth state from start endpoint

latitude.description: Device latitude. For promoters/merchandizers when geofencing is active, send with longitude. Supervisors/admins may omit.

longitude.description: Device longitude (pair with latitude when required for field roles).

redirectUri.description: Frontend redirect URI registered with Google OAuth

userId.description: Target user id whose sessions should be revoked

refreshToken.description: Refresh token to revoke the session

userIds.description: User ids (cuid) to add. Each must be an active promoter or merchandizer, and not already on this roster.
